rows.label: qev087606_MSG0001
rows.name:
I do not regret leaving the ranks
of the Growth to follow a path I
can take pride in as a Larsian.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087606_MSG0002
rows.name:
But my decision has placed a weighty
burden on our children, as well as
those who were hurt in the fighting.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087606_MSG0003
rows.name:
And now we are in dire need of medicine. Bring
us medical supplies and you will have our
aid. I swear it on my name as a Larsian![ST:wait ]
